subject: UGC for Aurora and The Celeste
body:
Aurora's Supernova dessert — that dark chocolate balloon dome cracked tableside — is exactly the kind of plating moment that stops a scroll.

I'm Mal, an Orlando-based UGC creator. I shoot photo and video for hospitality brands and produce assets their teams use directly in social and paid campaigns. Work is at https://worldwidewmal.com.

For The Celeste, I'm thinking a golden-hour Reel that opens on the celestial lobby art, moves through a room, and lands on the Supernova at Aurora — tying the hotel's whole aesthetic together in under 30 seconds. The UCF-adjacent audience skews exactly toward the travel-curious, dining-interested demographic that content like this converts.

Would this be useful for your content calendar?

— Mal
